parents.subject: LU-19545 ec: tight binding parity mirror to data mirror

commit.subject: LU-20110 tests: fix slow recovery-small test_136
commit.message:
LU-20110 tests: fix slow recovery-small test_136

The check added to debug intermittent test failures was checking
if a server had restarted was itself timing out while waiting for
the restarted server.

It now wraps the uptime_info print attempt in a timeout call to
avoid it hanging if the server is down.

Test-Parameters: trivial \
  env=SLOW=yes,FAILURE_MODE=HARD,ONLY=136 \
  clientcount=4 mdtcount=1 mdscount=2 osscount=2 \
  austeroptions=-R failover=true iscsi=1 \
  fstype=ldiskfs testlist=recovery-small

Fixes: 48bef4487ca6 ("LU-19726 tests: additional output for vbr test suite failures")
Signed-off-by: Maximilian Dilger <mdilger@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I55d9bf29d139c1493f8fdfc84885827513b2e124
